title: pepepopooo's Glitch Demon (Custom Origin)
description: Adds the Glitch Demon origin to your world.
body:
**Note:** This personal project of mine is considered done for now, but I will keep developing it when I have found ideas for more powers. Because the powers I promised to make are not really possible as of date but I'll make it happen eventually. ALSO, you need the [extra keybinds addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-extra-keybinds) for one power to work.

## Introduction

This is a custom origin where you're a very op computer virus man in the overworld. Inspired from Antisepticeye, a well-known youtuber character from the Jacksepticeye channel. He is depicted to be a powerful anomaly and infects people, so [expect him to be very broken in an SMP.](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/813795300691017798/1125244872941637632/Minecraft__1.19.2_-_Singleplayer_2023-07-02_20-22-49.gif)

This origin's powers feature influences and references from all things Jacksepticeye, including some non-canon and theorized powers. That means some of these will be changed when Jack releases more lore videos that could potentially revolve about Anti.

Here's the list of powers in this datapack that only works on both glitch demons and glitchers.<sup>1</sup> Have a snack with you because it's a very long and detailed one so here it goes.

## Main powers from the lore:

**WATCHR** `TERNARY KEY` - An ability to spectate the world for 30 seconds, before being teleported back to where you activated the power. Cooldown is 1:30

**Throw Ender Pearl** `PRIMARY KEY` - You can teleport, because I think Anti teleports.

**Sadomasochist** <sup>(can I say that here?)</sup> - Upon acquiring the origin, you get an enchanted iron sword with mending, sharpness 2, and unbreaking 3.

**Float** - You can creative fly up to 5 blocks from the ground, but also when there are blocks within the radius. So you can only fly on certain places like cliffs and poles and can't really fly indefinitely.

**Comatose** - Right-clicking on a mob with any sword will give them darkness, blindness, slowness 100 and mining fatigue 4 for 15 seconds.

**Attention** - Players with the glitch demon origin will get haste, regeneration, absorption, and resistance if players with the glitcher origin look at glitch demon havers.<sup>1</sup>

**Antiseptic Eyes** `disabled` - Mobs will get nausea, mining fatigue, and wither, with a duration of 3 seconds if they look at you. This only affects most hostile mobs for now, because if I include passive mobs, they will die.

<sup>WIP</sup>**Puppeteering** - VERY JANKY, but yes. You can mount on any mob (including bosses) and control their movement. This will be changed when I found a mod with good manipulation feature.

**Strings On Me** - You get two times the block and entity reach of a normal player.

**"I am eternal!"** - keepinventory is embedded to this origin.

**"I am a turtle!"** - A joke power from a reference, but it does help you. You will receive an enchanted turtle helmet with mending 5 and unbreaking 10.

**"I love you, wall!"** - Another joke power. You can phase through walls (not blocks, walls) and receive absorption 2, resistance 2, and regeneration 3 effects.

**Crochet** - You can make cobwebs in your inventory menu by grabbing 2 sticks with your cursor, and right-click on a stack of strings. (4 strings minimum)

**/zoom** <sup>(well kind of)</sup> - You get extra fast when sprinting. You also glitch a lot more and you're translucent.

**Overnight Watch** - You get 45% of gamma. (Semi night vision)

**"His body was weak!"** - Attacking mobs will give them weakness 3 and slowness 2 effects.

## Some debuffs to combat the op-ness (and references):

**Firewall** - Fire damage is 2x more brutal, and you can't use shields.

**"Sleep is for the weak!"** - You can still set your spawn, but you get, well, weak when you use beds. Consists of nausea and mining fatigue effects.

**Rival weakness** - You take 1.5x more potion damage, influenced from Darkiplier, his nemesis. You also cannot use potions for that reason. <sup>(Just pretend it's canon...)</sup>

## Miscellaneous powers:

You have Anti's signature green tinge and glitchy effects.

Receive natural iron armor.

**Heal** `SECONDARY KEY` - You heal 3 hearts. When used, you will glow for 15 seconds, which will make glitcher players to see where you are.<sup>1</sup> Very useful in emergency situations.

**Turtle Boost** - Turtles glow green within 100 blocks of range from you. Get close to 50 blocks and you will get conduit power, water breathing, and dolphin's grace 2.

Glitcher players won't die if they are down to half heart, but they will be paralyzed. Approach them to help them.<sup>1</sup>

You are immune to weakness, poison, fire resistance, and fall damage.

**Friendly Fire** - You and the glitchers can't hit each other.<sup>1</sup>

**Leech** - You can right-click on one of your minions with a weapon to heal a heart. This damages them in return.<sup>1</sup>

**Invincibility** - Sneaking will make you somewhat transparent and makes you invulnerable to some damages. You also have more glitchy particles when doing so. This consumes your sustenance fast, and you can't attack anyone. But instead you heal them, useful if you hurt someone by accident.

## Special thanks

**People over the Origins Discord** - They help me debug the powers I make/modified. They also helped me with how types and conditions work, which improved my development of this origin.

**zorraz** - for sharing the `control mount` power, which I then used for the Puppeteering ability.

**lukoraptor** - I forked their glitcher origin, and made this monstrosity. But this also means that I got the approval for the use of their custom origin, so consider checking their stuff too.

The base of their origin was used as the minion of the glitch demon, so that means you can get more buffs when your friend is a glitcher while you're a glitch demon, and vice versa. The latest version of the glitcher origin is only found on discord<sup>(I think)</sup>

### Notes

<sup>1</sup>Unproven to work because I can't test it myself (I have no friends)

Powers with star badges are the lore-inspired powers.

[Antisepticeye skin](https://www.minecraftskins.com/skin/13802216/olden-day-anti/) by Divinezero23
